subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the Sovereign, the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the Bestower, which have descended from the heaven of revelation unto him who hath believed in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک المقتدر العزیز الوهاب قد نزلت من سماء الوحی لمن آمن بالله
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering and imprisonment
